title: panphalea heterophylla
intro: Panphalea heterophylla is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as a type of flowering shrub. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in treating fever, inflammation, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Panphalea heterophylla include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic agent, which can help to reduce pain and promote wound healing. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
